title: Innodata Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: INOD 2024 Annual Results and Full Year Revenue Growth. Full Year 2024 Revenue: $170.5 million, up 96% from revenue of $86.8 million in 2023. Q4 2024 Performance: Revenue $59.2 million, up 127% from revenue of $26.1 million in same period last year. Key Business Highlights: Largest customer expansion: Additional programs and expansions awarded in Q4 and January, valued at approximately $24 million of annualized run rate revenue, expanding total annualized run rate revenue with this customer to approximately $135 million. Big Tech customer growth: Aggregate revenues from seven other Big Tech customers grew 159% in Q4 over Q3 of 2024. 2025 Guidance: Company forecasting 40% or more revenue growth in 2025 based primarily on won deals and near-in, forecastable business.
